values.Task Assigned: GPL Support For PLC Setup
values.Details:
We need to assist GPL in diagnosing and setting up their VPN connectivity over our network. At present, the technician is unable to establish a connection from any of their locations. He is attempting to connect to the Sophia site using the public IP, but the connection is not passing through. At this stage, we cannot rule out the possibility that the issue may be on our end.
To properly test this, please proceed as follows:
Visit GPL Duke Street and bring a MikroTik router to perform a fresh setup.
Configure the router from scratch and attempt to establish a VPN connection to the Sophia location.
Once the connection is successfully established, document and create a template configuration.
Provide this template to GPL so they can replicate the configuration across their other sites.

This approach is similar to what we are currently doing with PLC over Starlink. My understanding is that they are using WireGuard instead of L2TP, which is acceptable. We can support either method as needed. If required, we can also proceed with WireGuard configuration, as we recently set up a WireGuard VPN as well.
Please document the results of the test and any configuration used so we can standardize the deployment for their other locations.
